## Summary

- What: Brief description of the change
- Why: Reason / motivation

## Changes
- Bullet list of changes

## Verification
- How was this tested? (local steps or CI)

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] CI is passing
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, changelog)
- [ ] Related issue referenced (if any)

Assign reviewers and add any migration / release notes as needed.
